title: Sophora masafuerana
intro:

Sophora, commonly referred to as Sophora species, is a genus of flowering plants in the legume family, Fabaceae. Sophora species, including Sophora masafuerana, have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to their potential health benefits, such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Sophora species include isoflavones, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for their medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Sophora species include teas, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
